summary: Classified the hydrated QMD memory cluster without direct GitHub mutation. #65481 is the best current canonical PR for the --mask collection-pattern regression, but it is not merge-ready because the artifact has only label checks and no clean Codex /review or full validation. #63678 is scoped to security routing only. Other open PRs are related or superseded follow-up work and should remain open until the canonical repair path lands.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive PRs are out of ProjectClownfish mutation scope and must route to central OpenClaw security triage.
